用于在战场环境下快速识别死者与伤员身份的俄军制式身份识别牌。这块狗牌的前主人是一位 BEAR PMC。

Army dogtags serve the purpose of quickly identifying the wounded and deceased in combat. This one belonged to a BEAR PMC operator.
